_purpose: Smoke-shape input fixture for the doe.tsir.real.attention_head256_f16kv kernel. The bootstrap oracle has no attention bodyOp support yet (per runtime/zig/tests/tsir/real/attention_head256_f16kv/attention_head256_f16kv.notes.md, the schema cannot express attention semantics until D3 lands attention_scores bodyOp + softmax reduction representation + sequence-axis softmax collective). This fixture exists so the canary can locate paired inputs by kernel name and produce a 'not_implemented' deferred receipt rather than FileNotFoundError. Real-shape dims are HEAD_DIM=256, BLOCK_SIZE=32; these smoke values are intentionally tiny.
